error_signature: This operation expects the nodes input to be binary
title: HTTP Request does not return binary data
symptom: When trying to write a downloaded PNG file to disk, n8n throws an error stating 'This operation expects the nodes input to be binary'.
applies_when: Using HTTP Request node to download a PNG file
Attempting to write the file using Read/Write Files node
not_this_if: The HTTP Request node is configured to return data in binary format
root_cause: The HTTP Request node may not be configured to return the response as a binary file. By default, it may return the response in a different format, which leads to the subsequent node not receiving the expected binary data.
fix_steps: Open the HTTP Request node settings
agent_instruction: Set the HTTP Request node to return the response as a binary file.
